lifecycle_findings.active_target_count_observability: direction active target counts emitted separately per candidate and target family
lifecycle_findings.baseline_mutation_guard: when disabled: no model copy, no teacher allocation, no extra forward, no RNG/dropout/checkpoint/optimizer/scheduler/logit/prediction/model/control-flow change except inert argument parsing
lifecycle_findings.buffer_scope: all model.state_dict buffers needed for deterministic forward; integer/non-floating buffers copied exactly, not EMA-averaged
lifecycle_findings.checkpoint_save_event: future enabled checkpoint save must include snapshot state and successful_step_count; disabled saves preserve existing schema
lifecycle_findings.determinism_requirements: copy after successful optimizer update only; GradScaler overflow skip must not advance snapshot; stable state_dict key order for copy and metrics
lifecycle_findings.device_policy: teacher state/device follows student device when enabled; serialized copies are CPU tensors
lifecycle_findings.drift_observability: student_teacher_parameter_l2 and relative_l2 expected near zero after one step; near-identity target degeneracy is explicitly counted
lifecycle_findings.dropout_policy: teacher is eval-mode for reads, so dropout is disabled; disabled instrumentation consumes no RNG
lifecycle_findings.dtype_policy: snapshot/EMA tensors preserve student dtype unless explicitly cast by future instrumentation; metrics report bytes by dtype
lifecycle_findings.estimated_forward_cost: one additional no_grad teacher forward per observed batch when enabled; zero when disabled
lifecycle_findings.estimated_memory_cost: approximately one additional full model state copy plus metric counters
lifecycle_findings.exact_tie_policy: ignore exact teacher zero deltas and exact order ties; exact ties contribute tie metrics only
lifecycle_findings.initialization_copy_semantics: deep copy parameters and buffers; snapshot initially equals initialized student
lifecycle_findings.initialization_event: immediately after model construction, checkpoint load if any, device move, and before first training epoch/batch
lifecycle_findings.nonzero_gradient_target_count_observabil: direction nonzero-gradient count is observational only in future instrumentation and must not backpropagate in P9-P1
lifecycle_findings.nonzero_target_count_observability: direction nonzero observational target counts emitted separately; no loss target is created in P9-P1
lifecycle_findings.parameter_scope: all model.state_dict floating parameters needed to reproduce output['logits']; no optimizer-owned teacher parameters
lifecycle_findings.read_event: before each future teacher-target observation for the current training batch, using the snapshot from the immediately preceding successful optimizer step
lifecycle_findings.read_grad_policy: teacher outputs and target signs/pairs are stop-gradient; teacher parameters require_grad=false and are absent from optimizer
lifecycle_findings.read_mode: teacher.eval() under no_grad/inference-style context; student target quantities remain live only in future instrumentation
lifecycle_findings.resume_missing_state_policy: fail closed when instrumentation is enabled and a required teacher state is missing; disabled baseline ignores absence
lifecycle_findings.resume_restore_event: future enabled resume restores student plus previous_step_snapshot before first resumed batch read
lifecycle_findings.resume_validation: validate snapshot keys/shapes/dtypes/devices after restore and validate one-step-lag metadata against successful_step_count
lifecycle_findings.seed_ownership: student initialization and dataloader generator remain owned by existing args.seed; teacher introduces no independent seed
lifecycle_findings.source_evidence: scripts/train_controlled_v6b_minimal.py::run_training_v6b optimizer step branches after total_loss backward; src/contramamba/modeling_v6b_minimal.py::ContraMambaV6BMinimal.forward output['logits']
lifecycle_findings.state_container: separate frozen nn.Module or state_dict mirror named previous_step_snapshot
lifecycle_findings.state_owner: future trainer-local TeacherStateObserver, not model and not optimizer
lifecycle_findings.train_eval_policy: student stays in existing train/eval flow; teacher read uses eval mode and then restores no student mode
lifecycle_findings.update_event: after a successful optimizer.step or successful GradScaler step/update boundary and before subsequent evaluation/teacher reads
lifecycle_findings.update_position_relative_to_optimizer_st: strictly after a successful optimizer update; no update on skipped/overflow step
lifecycle_findings.update_position_relative_to_scheduler_st: no scheduler is directly used by run_training_v6b; if future scheduler is added, snapshot remains after optimizer success and before/independent of scheduler-only state movement

lifecycle_findings.seed_ownership: student initialization and dataloader generator remain owned by existing args.seed; teacher introduces no independent seed
lifecycle_findings.source_evidence: P9-P0 treats EMA as conceptual preference only; scripts/train_controlled_v6b_minimal.py::run_training_v6b exposes optimizer step boundary but no EMA owner, decay, serialization, or resume today
lifecycle_findings.state_container: separate frozen nn.Module or state_dict mirror named ema_student_teacher plus explicit decay metadata
lifecycle_findings.state_owner: future trainer-local EMA TeacherStateObserver, not model and not optimizer
lifecycle_findings.train_eval_policy: student stays in existing train/eval flow; teacher read uses eval mode and then restores no student mode
lifecycle_findings.update_event: after successful optimizer update; EMA update is skipped when optimizer update is skipped/overflowed
lifecycle_findings.update_position_relative_to_optimizer_st: strictly after successful optimizer step or successful GradScaler step/update
lifecycle_findings.update_position_relative_to_scheduler_st: no scheduler is directly used by run_training_v6b; future scheduler must not own EMA decay or teacher authority
lifecycle_findings.warmup_policy: EMA initialized equal to student; update_count and effective teacher age are metrics; no decay value chosen

lifecycle_findings.active_target_count_observability: order active target counts emitted separately per candidate and target family
lifecycle_findings.baseline_mutation_guard: when disabled: no model copy, no teacher allocation, no extra forward, no RNG/dropout/checkpoint/optimizer/scheduler/logit/prediction/model/control-flow change except inert argument parsing
lifecycle_findings.buffer_scope: all model.state_dict buffers needed for deterministic forward; integer/non-floating buffers copied exactly, not EMA-averaged
lifecycle_findings.checkpoint_save_event: future enabled checkpoint save must include EMA state, decay representation, update_count, warmup metadata; disabled saves preserve existing schema
lifecycle_findings.determinism_requirements: stable state_dict key order; no_grad EMA formula on floating tensors only; integer buffers copied exactly; no random decay
lifecycle_findings.device_policy: teacher state/device follows student device when enabled; serialized copies are CPU tensors
lifecycle_findings.drift_observability: student-teacher distance, effective teacher age, sign-flip rate, exact-tie rate, direction/order target counts
lifecycle_findings.dropout_policy: teacher is eval-mode for reads, so dropout is disabled; disabled instrumentation consumes no RNG
lifecycle_findings.dtype_policy: snapshot/EMA tensors preserve student dtype unless explicitly cast by future instrumentation; metrics report bytes by dtype
lifecycle_findings.estimated_forward_cost: one additional no_grad teacher forward per observed batch plus per-successful-step EMA tensor update when enabled; zero when disabled
lifecycle_findings.estimated_memory_cost: approximately one additional full model state copy plus EMA metadata/counters
lifecycle_findings.exact_tie_policy: ignore exact teacher zero deltas and exact order ties; exact ties contribute tie metrics only
lifecycle_findings.initialization_copy_semantics: deep copy floating parameters/buffers from student; integer buffers copied exactly
lifecycle_findings.initialization_event: immediately after initialized/restored student is ready and before first batch
lifecycle_findings.initialization_source: initialized student state; no EMA decay value selected by P9-P1
lifecycle_findings.nonzero_gradient_target_count_observabil: order nonzero-gradient count is observational only in future instrumentation and must not backpropagate in P9-P1
lifecycle_findings.nonzero_target_count_observability: order nonzero observational target counts emitted separately; no loss target is created in P9-P1
lifecycle_findings.parameter_scope: all model.state_dict floating parameters needed to reproduce output['logits']; no optimizer-owned teacher parameters
lifecycle_findings.read_event: before each future teacher-target observation, read current EMA state from the previous completed EMA update
lifecycle_findings.read_grad_policy: teacher outputs and target signs/pairs are stop-gradient; teacher parameters require_grad=false and are absent from optimizer
lifecycle_findings.read_mode: teacher.eval() under no_grad/inference-style context; student target quantities remain live only in future instrumentation
lifecycle_findings.resume_missing_state_policy: fail closed when instrumentation is enabled and a required teacher state is missing; disabled baseline ignores absence
lifecycle_findings.resume_restore_event: future enabled resume restores EMA before first read; missing EMA state fails closed
lifecycle_findings.resume_validation: validate EMA key coverage, dtype/device policy, decay representation, update_count, and integer-buffer exact-copy policy
lifecycle_findings.seed_ownership: student initialization and dataloader generator remain owned by existing args.seed; teacher introduces no independent seed
lifecycle_findings.source_evidence: P9-P0 treats EMA as conceptual preference only; scripts/train_controlled_v6b_minimal.py::run_training_v6b exposes optimizer step boundary but no EMA owner, decay, serialization, or resume today
lifecycle_findings.state_container: separate frozen nn.Module or state_dict mirror named ema_student_teacher plus explicit decay metadata
lifecycle_findings.state_owner: future trainer-local EMA TeacherStateObserver, not model and not optimizer
lifecycle_findings.train_eval_policy: student stays in existing train/eval flow; teacher read uses eval mode and then restores no student mode
lifecycle_findings.update_event: after successful optimizer update; EMA update is skipped when optimizer update is skipped/overflowed
lifecycle_findings.update_position_relative_to_optimizer_st: strictly after successful optimizer step or successful GradScaler step/update
lifecycle_findings.update_position_relative_to_scheduler_st: no scheduler is directly used by run_training_v6b; future scheduler must not own EMA decay or teacher authority
lifecycle_findings.warmup_policy: EMA initialized equal to student; update_count and effective teacher age are metrics; no decay value chosen

scientific_interpretation.lifecycle_design_readiness: granted for ready candidate-family rows only

serialization_resume_findings.missing_state_policy: fail closed when instrumentation is enabled and a required teacher state is missing; disabled baseline ignores absence
serialization_resume_findings.restore_policy: future enabled resume restores student plus previous_step_snapshot before first resumed batch read
serialization_resume_findings.resume_exactness: enabled resume must preserve the candidate boundary exactly before the first resumed teacher read
serialization_resume_findings.save_payload_change_when_disabled: none; current checkpoint schema remains unchanged
serialization_resume_findings.save_payload_change_when_enabled: add teacher_state subtree only under explicit future observability flag

serialization_resume_findings.save_payload_change_when_disabled: none; current checkpoint schema remains unchanged
serialization_resume_findings.save_payload_change_when_enabled: add teacher_state subtree only under explicit future observability flag
serialization_resume_findings.source_evidence: scripts/train_controlled_v6b_minimal.py::_save_model_checkpoint/_save_stage160_checkpoint save model_state_dict plus metadata; no teacher key today
serialization_resume_findings.validation_required: validate EMA key coverage, dtype/device policy, decay representation, update_count, and integer-buffer exact-copy policy

scripts/train_controlled_v6b_minimal.py::run_training_v6b uses model.train(), optimizer.zero_grad(), forward, backward, clip_grad_norm_, optimizer step, then model.eval() with no_grad evaluation.
scripts/train_controlled_v6b_minimal.py::run_training_v6b has CUDA fp16 GradScaler step/update and plain optimizer.step branches.
